This is an outrageous lie

I have reservations about US involvement in Iran but have never made such egregious claims about Pete Hegseth

“If the war were to be extended it wouldn't really disrupt the US economy at all. It would hurt consumers…but that's really the last of our concerns right now."

They don’t care about us at all.

Just a reminder that President Trump’s memecoin surged more than 50% in 24 hours after it was announced that the top 297 holders would be invited to an exclusive Mar-a-Lago gala. 

Sounds pretty corrupt to us.
wsj.com/livecoverage/stock-m…




— https://nitter.net/CREWcrew/status/2033981746719453659#m

This is well said and resonant but is this just asking to reject or is there something better to attach to?


Mila Joy (@Milajoy)

I’m DONE.

40 FUCKING YEARS of sweat.  
Two degrees.  
Busted my ass.  
Raised good kids.  
Paid every damn tax.  
Obeyed every law.  
Voted like they told me to.  

And for what?

A system that laughs in our face.  
Politicians who lie straight to our cameras.  
Promises of “better days” that were just bait.  
While THEY cash checks and WE get the bill.

We built th

What you empower...you own


Piers Morgan (@piersmorgan)

🤣🤣The biggest problem with this is I’m not right-wing…



— https://nitter.net/piersmorgan/status/2033624794214605054#m

No love most here but that is a winning proposition?


Tim Miller (@Timodc)

These people will have only themselves to blame when President AOC starts garnishing their assets.



— https://nitter.net/Timodc/status/2033689594026160328#m

If he really believes what he is saying isn't that more troubling?


Roger Stone (@RogerJStoneJr)

You may disagree  with Tucker Carlson, you may loathe him but  if you think that his views are not heartfelt and that he is not a loyal American you are wrong .



— https://nitter.net/RogerJStoneJr/status/2033688692754165815#m
